MATTER CALLED AND PROCEEDS BY DEFAULT. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR POSSESSION OF 989 SHOTWELL ST. AND COSTS PER COST BILL.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELEON, GLORIA ISABEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 989 SHOTWELL, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 $129.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $129.00, LEASE FORFEITED
